description: A research librarian has identified three papers in your Zotero library with incorrect or incomplete author names. Your task is to correct these metadata errors to ensure accurate citations. Update the first author of 'Attention Is All You Need' (2017) by changing the first name to 'Ashish'. For 'Deep Learning' (2015), correct the first author's first name to 'Yann' and last name to 'LeCun'. For 'Generative Adversarial Nets' (2014), update the first author's first name to 'Ian J.'.
